title: Job Posting
description: Schema for individual job listings extracted from job boards and company career pages.

title.description: Job title or position name. Commonly found in: page h1 tag, job header, og:title meta tag.

company_name.description: Name of the hiring company. Commonly found in: company header, job details section, breadcrumb navigation.

company_domain.description: Website domain of the hiring company. Commonly found in: company website link, apply URL domain, company profile link.

location.description: Job location (city, state, country or Remote). Commonly found in: job metadata row, location badge, job details section.

remote_type.description: Remote work type for this position. Commonly found in: remote badge, job metadata row, work arrangement field.

employment_type.description: Employment type or contract duration. Commonly found in: job type badge, employment type field, job metadata row.

seniority_level.description: Seniority level of the position. Commonly found in: job title, seniority field, experience level badge.

salary_min.description: Minimum salary offered. Commonly found in: salary range display, compensation section, job metadata row.

salary_max.description: Maximum salary offered. Commonly found in: salary range display, compensation section, job metadata row.

salary_currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for salary values. Commonly found in: salary display, compensation section.

salary_interval.description: Pay interval for salary figures. Commonly found in: salary display label, compensation section.

equity.description: Whether equity or stock options are offered. Commonly found in: compensation section, benefits list, equity mention in description.

description.description: Full text of the job description. Commonly found in: job description section, main content area, responsibilities section.

requirements.description: List of job requirements or qualifications. Commonly found in: requirements section, qualifications list, what we're looking for.

tech_stack.description: List of technologies, tools, or programming languages mentioned. Commonly found in: tech stack section, requirements list, job description body.

benefits.description: List of benefits offered. Commonly found in: benefits section, perks list, what we offer section.

apply_url.description: Direct URL to apply for the position. Commonly found in: apply button href, application link, CTA button.

posted_date.description: Date the job was posted. Commonly found in: posted date metadata, listing date field, job metadata row.

expiry_date.description: Date the job listing expires. Commonly found in: closing date field, apply by date, job metadata.

job_id.description: Platform or company internal job identifier. Commonly found in: job ID field, URL parameter, reference number.

source_platform.description: Platform where the job was found (e.g., LinkedIn, Indeed). Commonly found in: site domain, platform branding, page footer.

department.description: Department or team for this role. Commonly found in: department field, team name, job metadata row.

visa_sponsorship.description: Whether visa sponsorship is available. Commonly found in: visa sponsorship field, requirements section, job description body.

source_url.description: URL of the page from which this job was extracted. Commonly found in: browser URL bar, canonical link tag, og:url meta tag.

extracted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this job posting was extracted. Commonly found in: extraction metadata, scraper system timestamp.
